headlines.title: Supreme Court Justice Brett Kavanaugh takes on a starring role in Maine’s Senate race
headlines.description: In a time of war and rising prices, Democrats in Maine say another issue is motivating them in the Senate race: Brett Kavanaugh’s Supreme Court confirmation eight years ago.

headlines.title: Brad Lander found not guilty of charges in incident at NYC immigration detention center
headlines.description: A New York judge ruled Thursday that congressional hopeful Brad Lander is not guilty of misdemeanor charges against him related to a September inspection attempt at an immigration holding facility in Manhattan.“I feel genuinely moved today by the rule of law — by the excellent legal counsel I had, by the thoughtful consideration by the judge, and by the simple knowledge that I could enter and leave the court safely,” Lander, a close political ally of Mayor Zohran Mamdani, said at a news co

headlines.title: Florida Supreme Court rejects challenge to new GOP-drawn congressional maps
headlines.description: The Florida Supreme Court has rejected a legal challenge from voting rights groups who sought to block Gov.

headlines.title: Pentagon is locked down after Hazmat incident dealing with air quality
headlines.description: A shelter-in-place order was given at the Pentagon after emergency crews were deployed to handle what authorities described as a “hazardous materials incident.” NBC News' Courtney Kube reports on the latest.

headlines.title: Bill Gates Accuses Jeffrey Epstein of Potential Blackmail at Hearing
headlines.description: Billionaire Bill Gates answered questions from lawmakers for six hours on Wednesday about his ties to Jeffrey Epstein, where he accused the late sex offender of possible blackmail over Gates’ extramarital affairs. Gates said Epstein “was working to use information about my infidelities, in addition to many lies that he layered on top, to pressure me to re-engage with him.” NBC’s Hallie Jackson reports for TODAY.

headlines.title: Trump Says 'I Love the Inflation' as Consumer Price Index Rises
headlines.description: After newly-released federal data showed inflation spiking to its highest level in three years, driven in large part by the soaring gas and oil prices related to the United States’ war with Iran, President Donald Trump reacted saying, “I love the inflation.” He later said that what he meant to say is that “despite the fact that we’re in a war, the numbers are much lower than anticipated.” NBC’s Garrett Haake reports for TODAY.

headlines.title: State Assemblyman Alex Bores speaks on AI and politics
headlines.description: State Assemblyman Alex Bores, a candidate for New York's 12th Congressional District, speaks with NBC News’ Gadi Schwartz about why some top artificial intelligence companies are opposing his candidacy and whether AI should play a role in politics.

headlines.title: Trump’s UFC matches are unprecedented, but sports at the White House aren’t
headlines.description: The UFC matches to be held on the lawn of the White House on President Donald Trump’s 80th birthday are sure to be a spectacle unseen in the history of the storied complex

headlines.title: Vance’s chief of staff to leave Trump administration
headlines.description: Jacob Reses, the chief of staff to Vice President JD Vance, will leave the administration at the end of the summer, people close to the vice president’s office said Thursday

headlines.title: Map: How much you pay in federal and state gas taxes
headlines.description: As national gas price averages head toward $5 per gallon, one state has already suspended its gas tax, and now President Donald Trump and his Cabinet are talking about doing the same.

headlines.title: Judge warns DOJ not to ‘play possum’ with ‘anti-weaponization’ fund it says is dead
headlines.description: The Trump administration has said the fund isn’t moving forward, but the president has said he’d like to pay purported victims “the kind of money that they deserve.”

headlines.title: Trump says ‘I love the inflation’ as annual rate jumps to a 3-year high
headlines.description: The president suggested the recent numbers mean there will be a bigger decline in inflation once the war in Iran is over.
